## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content updates, performance metrics, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 6 new pieces delivered last week, 6 planned for this week](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Blog performance hit new highs in sessions; non-branded impressions slightly down](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [LLM referrals decreasing for Strapi homepage/KB, increasing for GrowthX blogs](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Metadata addition to integration pages suggested to improve SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

## Topics

### Content Updates

  - [3 pages refreshed last week, 4 scheduled for this week](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [6 new content pieces delivered last week, 6 planned for this week](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [5 competitor comparison pages to be staged by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Medium distribution workflow completed; will start with latest blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [New high in sessions for GrowthX-generated blogs](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Top performing pages primarily from the blog section](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Non-branded impressions slightly down but still positive](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Conversion events stalled: Demo clicks up significantly, others declined](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Google traffic steadily declining, offset by increases in AI overviews and LLM traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### LLM Performance

  - [LLM referrals to Strapi homepage and KB pages decreased in August](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [GrowthX blog LLM referrals increasing week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Strapi's presence in LLMs positive compared to competitors (Contentful, Sanity, HyGraph)](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Citations lagging at 4%, identified as area for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)

### Integration Pages

  - [List of comparison pages confirmed (including Payload, Butter CMS, Keystone, Tina)](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Theodore suggested adding metadata to integration pages to improve SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Team to investigate batch update possibility, similar to previous AOP grid workflow](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Stage initial 5 competitor comparison pages by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Test CMS staging/publishing workflow this week](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Begin publishing latest blog posts to Medium, working backwards](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Investigate possibility of batch metadata updates for integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Analyze Scrunch data to identify areas for content enrichment and new content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Continue monitoring LLM performance and work on improving citation rates](https://fathom.video/share/ygjFdHXt2Ma14RCp1zWiYRoygTtYPk8-?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
